# Enforce terminology with kapi termbase + qa

> Generated from [`walkthroughs/kapi-terminology-qa.md`](https://github.com/neokapi/neokapi/blob/main/web/walkthroughs/kapi-terminology-qa.md). Do not edit by hand — change the prompt and regenerate.

A glossary makes terminology consistent across your translations and across locales. `kapi termbase` ingests CSVs, exposes lookup/search, and feeds into `kapi qa` to flag terminology drift in target files before they ship.

## Scene 1 — termbase-qa

<ThemedVideo
  sources={{
    light: "/video/kapi/01-termbase-qa.webm",
    dark: "/video/kapi/01-termbase-qa.webm",
  }}
/>

Import a CSV glossary into a named termbase, inspect stats, look up a specific term, search for related ones, then run `kapi pseudo-translate` followed by `kapi qa --termbase ...` to see violations flagged in the output.

## Next

Hook the same termbase into a flow with `kapi run` so every push runs the QA check automatically.
